blocks.body: Past Perfect Continuous: Questions and Short Answers — Had you been...?, How long had she been...? and short answers with had / hadn't.

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"In Past Perfect Continuous questions, we put had before the subject: Had + subject + been + V-ing?","rules":[{"label":"Had + subject + been + V-ing?","color":"emerald","text":"This is the basic yes/no question model.","example":"Had you been waiting long?"},{"label":"How long + had ... been + V-ing?","color":"blue","text":"Use this to ask about the duration of a process before a past moment.","example":"How long had she been working there before she left?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"Use had or hadn't in short answers.","example":"Yes, I had. / No, they hadn't."}]}

{"title":"1. Basic question patterns","intro":"Remember the word order in Past Perfect Continuous questions.","items":[{"label":"Yes / No","title":"Had + subject + been + V-ing?","subtitle":"Had she been studying before the test?"},{"label":"How long","title":"How long had + subject + been + V-ing?","subtitle":"How long had they been waiting?"},{"label":"Short yes","title":"Yes, ... had.","subtitle":"Yes, I had. / Yes, he had."},{"label":"Short no","title":"No, ... hadn't.","subtitle":"No, we hadn't. / No, she hadn't."}]}

{"title":"2. When we ask these questions","sections":[{"label":"Process before another event","color":"emerald","description":"Ask whether the action had already been continuing before another event in the past.","examples":[{"en":"Had they been waiting long before the doors opened?","ua":"The question checks the earlier duration."},{"en":"Had she been cooking when you arrived?","ua":"The speaker asks about the background process."}]},{"label":"Duration before a past moment","color":"blue","description":"Ask how long the process had lasted before a specific past point.","examples":[{"en":"How long had you been studying before the exam?","ua":"The question is about duration before that moment."},{"en":"How long had he been working there by 2024?","ua":"The past point sets the limit."}]},{"label":"Reason or background","color":"amber","description":"Wh-questions help you find out why the process had been happening or what the background was.","examples":[{"en":"Why had she been crying before the meeting?","ua":"The speaker asks about the earlier reason."},{"en":"Why had they been driving so fast?","ua":"The question asks about the earlier situation."}]},{"label":"Short answers","color":"violet","description":"Answer briefly when a full sentence is not necessary.","examples":[{"en":"Had you been waiting long? Yes, I had.","ua":"A short answer is enough here."},{"en":"Had she been sleeping? No, she hadn't.","ua":"Use had or hadn't in the reply."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Word order","intro":"See where had and been stand in different questions.","rows":[{"en":"Had you been waiting before I called?","ua":"had + you + been waiting","note":"yes/no question"},{"en":"Had she been working there long?","ua":"had + she + been working","note":"question about duration"},{"en":"How long had they been living there before they moved?","ua":"how long + had + they + been living","note":"how long question"},{"en":"Had we been talking too loudly? No, we hadn't.","ua":"had ... been ... ? / no, ... hadn't","note":"short answer"}],"warning":"Do not say Did you had been waiting? In this tense, the auxiliary is already had."}

{"title":"4. Short summary","items":["Past Perfect Continuous questions = Had + subject + been + V-ing?","For duration, often use How long had ... been + V-ing?","Use had or hadn't in short answers.","Do not add did, because this tense already has its auxiliary."]}
